title: viola auricula
intro: Viola auricula, also known as the golden or yellow violet, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Viola auricula include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and act as an antioxidant. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
